canonical_definition: A systematic evaluation framework for assessing LLMs' disambiguation capabilities in multi-domain translation, including a multi-domain ambiguous word dataset, disambiguation prompt strategies, and disambiguation accuracy metric.
papers: JOLT-SQL: Joint Loss Tuning of Text-to-SQLwith Confusion-aware Noisy Schema Sampling
